query: query GetTrendingByUpc($upc: String!, $userId: String!) { getTrendingByUpc(upc: $upc, userId: $userId) { artistName productImgUrl productTitle trendingTracks { isrc trackTitle upcTitle imageUrl totalPlayCount weeklyPlayCount totalPlayCountDetails { spotify apple line amazon youtube } weeklyPlayCountDetails { spotify apple line amazon youtube } } } }
